prompt:
Create a realistic production-ready mobile UI mockup for a Chinese teacher mini-program My page, page title 我的. Target dimensions: 864 x 1536 portrait. Single screen only, no phone frame, no browser chrome. Concept direction: high-density teacher tool hub with progressive disclosure. The page should fit more useful information in limited space while staying calm and readable. Do not show notes, remarks, logic explanations, onboarding copy, design labels, or placeholder descriptions.

Business context: C-end transformation teacher app. Screen state is school version with multiple class sources. At the top, use a compact identity strip rather than a huge hero: real Chinese female teacher avatar, 刘飞飞老师, 成都七中初中附属小学, current class source 成都市未来实验小学 in a pill, scan and settings icon buttons. Preserve light AI-tech feeling through fine line details, soft cyan/lilac glow, and glassy white layers.

Information architecture: after identity strip, show a compact status row or mini metrics relevant to teacher tools without inventing too many features: 当前来源, 本学期, 6个工具. Then a 管理工具 group with 学校数据报表 and 生成期末报告. Then 更多工具 as dense 2x2 or 4-column compact grid: 科目管理, 部门管理, 货币发放, 建议反馈. Then 我的文件 row. Fixed bottom tab bar with 记录, 班级, 我的 selected. Use PingFang-style Chinese typography, 14px body, 15px section titles, 20px teacher name. Palette: white, pale cyan, moon blue, lilac, subtle pink, ink blue-gray. Use dividers and spacing before shadows. No heavy decorative cards, no nested cards, no 3D icons, no emoji.
